title: Add memory synthesis initialization flag to firtool. Fixes #4752

features.name: readmem guarded by synthesis preprocessor
features.description: Code should include a $readmemh or $readmemb statement wrapped in an `ifdef SYNTHESIS or `ifndef SYNTHESIS block, causing synthesis tools to miss memory initialization

features.name: unpacked memory array declaration
features.description: Code should include a unpacked memory array declaration with 2048 or more elements using reg type

features.name: readmem outside synthesis guard for synthesis tool compatibility
features.description: Code should include a $readmemh or $readmemb statement NOT wrapped in synthesis preprocessor guards, allowing synthesis tools like Yosys to access memory initialization
